name: Adventure Time RPG
description:
RPG based on the Adventure Time universe. Get to the Land of Ooo, become whoever you want, do whatever you want, and all that jazz.

Available characters (at the moment): Finn, Jake, Ice King, Princess Bubblegum, Marceline, Flame Princess, Lich, Lumpy Space Princess (LSP), Earl of Lemongrab, Hunson Abadeer, Peppermint Butler, Fern, Lady Rainicorn, BMO, Huntress Wizard

The bot will be further developed in future. I will try to make the characters exactly like in show.
creator: RICH1889
